title: TitanPRO™ Heavy Duty Birchwood Folding Banquet Table - 48" Round
features: Built under the TitanPRO™ Heavy Duty Birchwood standard — the most durable wood folding table line in the event industry — this 48" round seats 4 to 6 guests and is built to outlast lighter-duty alternatives in rental fleets and venue inventories.
If you're seeking the most durable wood folding table in the market at wholesale prices, look no further than our TitanPRO 48'' Round Heavy Duty Birchwood Folding Table.
It doesn't matter if you're a venue owner, party rental company, school, church or hosting a backyard wrestling event with the Dudley Boys, this table will last through the rigors of time.
All you need to do is pop the ultra sturdy steel gauge wishbone legs open and 4-6 of your guests can comfortably sit around the most secure wood folding table in the event industry.

With some plywood folding tables, you may worry about chipping or the occasional splinter but there's no need to fret with the 4 coat polyurethane finish top that might let a rib eye steak slide off it if you're not keeping an eye out.
Thick and rugged metal edging accompanies the sleek wood top to further prevent damage to the table when stacking, rolling or storing.

Commercial grade and event ready with no assembly required, buy our 48'' Round Heavy Duty Birchwood Folding Tables in bulk and outfit your venue for years to come!Round tables change how a room feels.
Where rectangular banquet tables create rows, 48" rounds create conversations — guests face each other rather than a wall of backs, and the room reads as warmer and more social.
For wedding venues, banquet halls, restaurants, and event rental operations, that distinction matters when clients are choosing between layouts.
The TitanPRO™ Heavy Duty Birchwood line exists specifically for operations that want to offer that experience without compromising on the construction durability that commercial use demands.
Every table in the Heavy Duty Birchwood line starts with a birchwood core, a hardwood chosen for its strength-to-weight ratio and its ability to hold a finish cleanly through repeated commercial use.

On the TitanPRO™, that finish is applied in four coats of polyurethane, producing a surface that resists moisture, staining, and everyday wear significantly longer than the single or double-coat finishes common on lower-price alternatives.

Metal edge banding wraps the full perimeter, absorbing the contact stress at the table's most vulnerable point during stacking, transport, and storage, keeping tables in clean, rentable condition over a long operational life.
Each birchwood top carries natural color and grain variation, so no two tables are precisely alike.
Steel wishbone legs fold flat and lock open securely during use, keeping the table stable under full loading at standard 30" banquet height.
At 47 lbs. and 48" in diameter, the TitanPRO™ Heavy Duty Birchwood 48" Round seats 4 to 6 guests comfortably and fits standard 90" round tablecloths off the shelf.
Tables stack for efficient warehouse storage and transport, and the TitanPRO™ Universal Table Dolly is the purpose-built companion for operations moving large quantities between events.
Ships fully assembled with no setup required on arrival.

specifications.Free Shipping Deal Type: Free Shipping on Tables and Chairs Over $5k, Free Shipping on 10 or more

faq.question: How many people does a 48" round table seat?
faq.answer: A 48" round table comfortably seats 4 to 6 guests. Four is the standard for a relaxed setting with adequate elbow room; six works in tighter configurations.

faq.question: What size tablecloth fits a 48" round table?
faq.answer: For a floor-length drop, use a 90" round tablecloth. For a shorter mid-length drop, a 72" round works well — both sizes are available on EventStable.com.

faq.question: Is birchwood durable enough for commercial use?
faq.answer: Yes. Birchwood is a hardwood with strong surface durability, and the four-coat polyurethane finish and metal edge banding extend that protection through years of stacking, transport, and regular commercial use.

faq.question: Does this table require assembly?
faq.answer: No. Ships fully assembled — unfold the legs and it's ready to use.
